calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

** After hearing - A dismissal having been filed, the OSC is off calendar. **

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-15-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: David L. Hart, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause Re Dismissal is re-set Jan-15-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
